Buying Guide

Not Sure What You Need?

Solar systems are not one-size-fits-all. The right panel wattage, inverter capacity, and battery bank depends on your actual load — not guesswork. Our engineers will assess your site and recommend the right combination before you spend a naira.

01
Tell us your load Appliances, usage hours, priority items
02
We size your system Panel wattage, inverter KVA, battery AH
03
We quote transparently Full BOQ with brand options and pricing
04
We install & commission Documented handover with system baseline
Get a Free Assessment

Our Quality Promise

  • All products from authorised channels only
  • Full manufacturer warranty honoured
  • Installation backed by TECIL guarantee
  • Technical support after every installation
  • Honest advice — we recommend what fits your budget
  • No counterfeit or grey-market products. Ever.
Ready to Go Solar?

Reliable Power Starts with a Single Call.

Talk to our technical team today. We'll assess your load, recommend the right system, and give you a clear, honest quote. No pressure. No nonsense.

0803 713 5545 WhatsApp Us

Nigeria's leading solar and inverter specialists — delivering end-to-end renewable energy solutions across Lagos, Port Harcourt, Calabar, Uyo, Ikom and beyond since 2008.
